👁️⚡🧪 Phases 3–5 — SEE · SPEED · PROVE

One bundled PR from a 10-agent workflow (P3 ∥ P4 ∥ P5, per-file ownership) + an adversarial verify stage that correctly said DO NOT SHIP until 3 blockers were fixed.
3
new CC events observed
(30/30 now covered)
64KB
tldr-summary head-read cap
(was: whole file, every Read)
0
osascript spawns on notify
(terminalSequence primary)
119
fake-eval files deleted
(System A retired)
7169
tests pass · validator PASS(0)
· both tsconfigs · biome clean

👁️ P3 — SEE

changebefore → after
telemetry-inventory.mdhand-written, still listed 5 buried writers as live → regenerated against HEAD; telemetry-inspect now cross-checks the registry closure (dead writer = ORPHANED 🔴, never "expected-but-empty"). Bonus finding: two co-writer rows were mislistings (different files entirely).
audit-activationboth activation doors bolted → /ork:audit-activation (user-invocable, still model-blocked by design); the "17 dormant agents" question can now be answered with data
testing-patternsunreachable deprecation redirect → model-invocable, redirect verified live to all 5 testing-* sub-skills
3 new eventsUserPromptExpansion · MessageDisplay · PostToolBatch — minimal async observers (metrics only, never content, never block), placed into existing bundles per run-hook.mjs bundleMap; accounting 148→151 global / 216→219 total, enforced by the closure gate's COUNT DRIFT class

⚡ P4 — SPEED

changebefore → after
tldr-summaryreadFileSync of the WHOLE file (≤2MB) on EVERY Read → statSync + bounded 64KB head read with extrapolated totals; 21 tests incl. "readFileSync never called" assertion
#1847 for realdesktop.ts spawned osascript per notification (issue closed-but-never-migrated) → OSC-777 terminalSequence primary (control-chars + OSC delimiter stripped from untrusted text), spawn only behind ORK_NOTIFY_OSASCRIPT=1; sound.ts → BEL. Plus a real hardening catch: bare truthy sound-type lookup let prototype keys through — now Object.hasOwn
learning-trackerparsed full learned-patterns.json on EVERY PermissionRequest (<10ms budget) → SessionStart distills a ≤2KB versioned cache (≤50 validated patterns); permission path reads only the tiny file; stale cache auto-removed when source vanishes
if: gatesaudited all 45 entries against CC snapshot history (if: semantics 2.1.85→2.1.176) → deliberate no-op: the 2 heavy Bash entries were ALREADY gated; non-Bash path-pattern gates only stabilized in CC 2.1.176 and need live verification first. Honest skip, documented per entry

🧪 P5 — PROVE

changebefore → after
Hook Coverage jobnever ran vitest → grep-based filename heuristic fed a fake 75% gate → job now runs vitest --coverage, report reads real JSON; double-fake found: | tee was also swallowing the report's exit code — fixed with pipefail
ci-report thresholdsnpm run test:coverage … || true → exit captured and re-raised (plain || true removal would have been a NO-OP under tee); report/comment steps keep rendering via !cancelled()
--retry 2flake mask in CI → suite run twice locally, fully clean both times → retry removed; flakes now surface
System A evals114 never-executed .eval.json specs + wc-w "grading" + census ratchet → 119 files deleted; System B (the real claude -p grader) untouched and now wired: new PR-triggered skill-eval.yml runs eval:skill --changed, skips LOUDLY without the auth secret, fails honestly with it

🛡️ The verify stage earned its keep

Verdict as returned: DO NOT SHIP — 3 blockers. All three were real and all were fixed before this PR: 
1. 12× TS2352 in the new observer tests (stricter test tsconfig that Hooks CI runs)
2. async-count snapshots 104→107 missed in 2 files ("the most-missed step in hook PRs")
3. count drift 216≠219 — manifests description + rebuild
+ warning: 5 untagged `as any` in a test — replaced with typed casts
Final gates: validate-registry PASS (200 registered = 200 reachable, 0 dead) · tsc clean on BOTH configs · biome clean · vitest 290 files / 7169 passed (the one flaky test healed by the rebuild, as the verifier predicted) · edge-cases 22/22 · validate-counts ✓ 219 · actionlint: only the 5 style findings that reproduce byte-identically on main.

📎 Known pre-existing failures (inherited from main, not this branch)

• test-token-overhead Test 6: total session overhead ~6143 > 5500 (env-dependent; already failing at 33 skills)
• test:manifests: design-stylecards ISLAND (zero refs on main; needs its own wiring decision)
• actionlint: 5 shellcheck style findings, byte-identical on origin/main
Produced by workflow wf_72e274b9 (10 agents, 0 errors, ~75 min) with per-file ownership sequencing (hooks.json and ci.yml single-owner). Verify stage: ork:code-quality-reviewer, read-only, adversarial.
